---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If it touches the
REST API, sketch the endpoint(s), request/response shapes, or config you have in
mind.

## Scope check

Zvec Server is intentionally a **thin storage layer over Zvec**. It deliberately
does not include authentication, multi-tenancy, embedding generation, or other
application concerns. Please confirm your request fits that scope, or explain why
it should be reconsidered.

- [ ] This is a storage / vector-search capability, not an application concern.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or references here.
